title: Throwback Thursday
excerpt: This is a behind the scenes look that I never shared from back in August 2013 when we were working on the Plus One collection. We were fully focused and had just finished up the style sheet and when Jennifer…
body: This is a behind the scenes look that I never shared from back in August 2013 when we were working on the Plus One collection. We were fully focused and had just finished up the style sheet and when Jennifer brought her 2 month old son, Everett into the American Crafts office. His smiles completely lit up the room.
